notes: v365 — 🔷 BLOCK ▲ TICKABLE + PANEL FREEZE FIX. (1) The bot's 'only buy when showing at least one ticked signal' row now includes 🔷 Block ▲ — a block-trade day whose direction reads as buying (a ▼ distribution block never counts as a buy). The other flags you noticed missing — 📉 Dist?, 👁 EOD, 🚨 sharp-move — are warning/watch flags, not buy signals, so they stay out of the buy row on purpose (the 🧩 combo gate and 📋 report card still use Block days). (2) Freeze fix for 📋 My Trading Rules and 💼 Portfolio: with the full table restored in v363, every tap inside a panel was paying layout costs for the thousand-plus heavy table rows sitting behind the backdrop — the app now parks the table while a panel is open and restores it (scroll position kept) when the panel closes, so panels are snappy no matter how many rows are showing. Includes everything from v362–v364 (startup auto-run fix, full table view, portfolio engine fixes). Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to load v365.
